title: Share your thoughts - Canada.ca
content:
Send us your feedback, or share your ideas for sustainability in Canada.

## Public consultation report
Look at the public consultation report on the current Strategy

## By email or in the mail
Send us your feedback, comments, and ideas on the strategy.
- Email us: SDO-BDD@ec.gc.ca
- Write to us: Sustainable Development Office 351 Saint-Joseph Boulevard, 16th Floor, Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
